summary: P0.5 Smart Repair Pipeline Refactor - All tests passed. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: Admin Dashboard Comic Health tab renders correctly with all required sections. Smart Repair Pipeline section correctly hidden (no data yet). UI Emotional Safety audit passes with 0 violations.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection returns 403 - may be expected for preview environment

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 new pipeline modules (pipeline_enums, attempt_logger, validator_stack, prompt_composer, model_router, character_lock_service, panel_orchestrator) are importable and functional
UI safety audit passes - no scary words (fail, error, broken, crash, timeout) in user-facing text
Smart Repair Pipeline section correctly conditionally renders only when smart_repair data exists
Fallback validation endpoints (single_panel, majority_failure) work correctly after refactor
Comic health metrics endpoint returns smart_repair, validation_quality, and recent_validations fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0.5 Smart Repair Pipeline refactor is complete and tested. All 6 new modules in /app/backend/services/comic_pipeline/ are functional. The PanelOrchestrator replaces the old blind-retry generate_single_panel function. Smart repair metrics will populate once real jobs go through the new pipeline. Admin Dashboard Comic Health tab shows all required sections including Validation Quality (5 Dimensions), Fallback Validation Tests, Character Consistency, Quality Checks, Downloads, and Conversion metrics.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/admin/metrics/comic-health - PASS (smart_repair, validation_quality, recent_validations fields present)
frontend_sections: Admin Dashboard Comic Health tab - PASS
Fallback Validation Tests section with buttons - PASS
Smart Repair Pipeline section (conditional) - PASS (correctly hidden when no data)
pipeline_modules_importable: pipeline_enums.py - FailureType, ModelTier, RepairMode, PipelineState, PanelStatus, RiskBucket, PASS_THRESHOLDS, FALLBACK_THRESHOLDS, MODEL_TIER_MAPPING
model_router.py - ModelRouter with choose_initial_tier, choose_repair_strategy methods
